{{Quote|Don't we have battle droids for this?|Plure Barron|audio=plure.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
'''Plure Barron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] and administrator of the mining colony on the mineral-rich [[Krant]]ian [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Aereen]]. She was killed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] during the [[Battle of Aereen|battle]] led by [[Echuu Shen-Jon]].

==Behind the scenes==
Plure Barron was voiced by [[Paula Killen]] in the game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''.

*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
